title: Meta’s AI Incubator Is Developing an OpenRouter Rival to Cut Coding Costs
summary: The incubator, called AAI Labs, is part of Meta’s Applied AI Engineering team, which Meta set up in March and allows employees to pitch AI-powered products and services for internal use—and possibly later release them to the public.
